entry.title: New: BILL076(25) (Honolulu) — PUBLISH
entry.content:
RELATING TO GOVERNMENT TRANSPARENCY.

Requires the BFS Director, no later than January 1, 2027, to develop, maintain, and make publicly available a searchable, online database of City revenues and expenditures that is free, open to the public, updated at least monthly, and accessible through an open checkbook-style, web-based system. Requires the database to include specified expenditure information and protect confidential information.

Latest action: Second reading notice published in the Honolulu Star-Advertiser.

View on the council site
